# rg - Complete API Documentation

> A terminal/grid rendering library for roguelikes

**Version:** 0.1.0

## README.md

### rg

A terminal/grid rendering library for roguelikes.

#### Under Construction

This project is currently being scaffolded.

---

## src/cell.rs

### Cell

```rust
#[derive(Debug, Clone, Copy, PartialEq, Eq, Hash)]
pub struct Cell {
    pub glyph: char,
    pub style: Style,
}
```

A single cell in the terminal grid.

### impl Default for Cell

```rust
impl Default for Cell {
}
```


### impl Cell

```rust
impl Cell {
    pub fn new(glyph: char, style: Style) -> Self;
    pub fn with_glyph(self, glyph: char) -> Self;
    pub fn with_style(self, style: Style) -> Self;
}
```



## src/color.rs

### AnsiColor

```rust
#[derive(Debug, Clone, Copy, PartialEq, Eq, Hash, Default)]
pub enum AnsiColor {
    Black,
    Red,
    Green,
    Yellow,
    Blue,
    Magenta,
    Cyan,
    White,
    BrightBlack,
    BrightRed,
    BrightGreen,
    BrightYellow,
    BrightBlue,
    BrightMagenta,
    BrightCyan,
    BrightWhite,
}
```

Standard 16-color ANSI palette.

Prefer `Ansi` colors when you want your game to respect the user's
terminal color theme (e.g., Solarized, Nord, or custom themes).
Use `Rgb` for fixed colors that must appear identical regardless of
the user's terminal configuration.

### impl AnsiColor

```rust
impl AnsiColor {
    pub fn to_index(self) -> u8;
}
```


### Color

```rust
#[derive(Debug, Clone, Copy, PartialEq, Eq, Hash, Default)]
pub enum Color {
    Default,
    Ansi(AnsiColor),
    Indexed(u8),
    Rgb { r: u8, g: u8, b: u8 },
}
```

Represents a color in the terminal grid.

### impl Color

```rust
impl Color {
    pub const RED: Type;
    pub const GREEN: Type;
    pub const BLUE: Type;
    pub const WHITE: Type;
    pub const BLACK: Type;
}
```



## src/terminal.rs

### Terminal

```rust
pub struct Terminal<B> {
}
```

The main entry point for `rg`.

Generic over the backend. Owns a double-buffered grid and provides
a stateful drawing API.

### impl Terminal

```rust
impl<B> Terminal {
    pub fn new(backend: B) -> Self;
    pub fn fg(&mut self, color: Color) -> &mut Self;
    pub fn bg(&mut self, color: Color) -> &mut Self;
    pub fn modifier(&mut self, modifier: CellModifier) -> &mut Self;
    pub fn reset_style(&mut self) -> &mut Self;
    pub fn style(&self) -> Style;
    pub fn put(&mut self, x: u16, y: u16, ch: char);
    pub fn grid(&self) -> &Grid;
    pub fn backend(&self) -> &B;
    pub fn backend_mut(&mut self) -> &mut B;
    pub fn clear(&mut self);
    pub fn clear_region(&mut self, rect: Rect);
    pub fn put_styled(&mut self, x: u16, y: u16, ch: char, style: Style);
    pub fn print(&mut self, x: u16, y: u16, text: &str);
    pub fn present(&mut self);
}
```



## src/lib.rs

### color::{AnsiColor, Color}

```rust
pub use color::{AnsiColor, Color};
```


### style::{CellModifier, Style}

```rust
pub use style::{CellModifier, Style};
```

```rust
pub use cell::Cell;
```

pub use grid::{Grid, Position, Size, Rect};
```

pub use backend::{Backend, Headless};
```

```rust
pub use terminal::Terminal;
```

```rust
pub use event::{Event, KeyCode, KeyEvent, KeyModifiers, MouseButton, MouseEvent, MouseEventKind};
```



## src/style.rs

### CellModifier

```rust
#[derive(Clone, Copy, PartialEq, Eq, Hash, Default)]
pub struct CellModifier();
```

Text attributes applied to a cell (bold, italic, etc.).

Implemented as a manual bitflag over `u8`. Combine with `|`.

#### Examples

```
use rg::style::CellModifier;

let attrs = CellModifier::BOLD | CellModifier::ITALIC;
assert!(attrs.contains(CellModifier::BOLD));
assert!(attrs.contains(CellModifier::ITALIC));
assert!(!attrs.contains(CellModifier::UNDERLINE));
```

### impl CellModifier

```rust
impl CellModifier {
    pub const NONE: Type;
    pub const BOLD: Type;
    pub const DIM: Type;
    pub const ITALIC: Type;
    pub const UNDERLINE: Type;
    pub const BLINK: Type;
    pub const REVERSE: Type;
    pub const HIDDEN: Type;
    pub const STRIKETHROUGH: Type;
    pub fn contains(self, other: Self) -> bool;
    pub fn is_empty(self) -> bool;
}
```


### impl BitOr for CellModifier

```rust
impl BitOr for CellModifier {
}
```


### impl BitOrAssign for CellModifier

```rust
impl BitOrAssign for CellModifier {
}
```


### impl BitAnd for CellModifier

```rust
impl BitAnd for CellModifier {
}
```


### impl BitAndAssign for CellModifier

```rust
impl BitAndAssign for CellModifier {
}
```


### impl Not for CellModifier

```rust
impl Not for CellModifier {
}
```


### impl core::fmt::Debug for CellModifier

```rust
impl core::fmt::Debug for CellModifier {
}
```


### Style

```rust
#[derive(Debug, Clone, Copy, PartialEq, Eq, Hash, Default)]
pub struct Style {
    pub fg: Color,
    pub bg: Color,
    pub modifiers: CellModifier,
}
```

A style consisting of foreground, background, and text modifiers.

### impl Style

```rust
impl Style {
    pub fn new() -> Self;
    pub fn fg(self, color: Color) -> Self;
    pub fn bg(self, color: Color) -> Self;
    pub fn bold(self) -> Self;
    pub fn italic(self) -> Self;
    pub fn patch(self, other: Self) -> Self;
}
```



## src/backend/headless.rs

### Headless

```rust
pub struct Headless {
}
```

In-memory backend for testing. Stores presented content
and allows injecting synthetic events.

### impl Headless

```rust
impl Headless {
    pub fn new(width: usize, height: usize) -> Self;
    pub fn grid(&self) -> &Grid;
    pub fn cursor_visible(&self) -> bool;
    pub fn cursor_position(&self) -> Position;
    pub fn push_event(&mut self, event: Event);
}
```


### impl Backend for Headless

```rust
impl Backend for Headless {
}
```



## src/backend/mod.rs

### headless::Headless

```rust
pub use headless::Headless;
```


### Backend

```rust
pub trait Backend {
    fn draw<'a, I>(&mut self, content: I)
    where
        I: Iterator;
    fn flush(&mut self);
    fn size(&self) -> Size;
    fn clear(&mut self);
    fn poll_event(&mut self, timeout: Duration) -> Option<Event>;
    fn set_cursor_visible(&mut self, visible: bool);
    fn set_cursor_position(&mut self, position: Position);
}
```

A rendering backend that presents grid content to a display
and provides input events.


## src/event.rs

### KeyModifiers

```rust
#[derive(Debug, Clone, Copy, PartialEq, Eq, Hash, Default)]
pub struct KeyModifiers();
```

Keyboard modifier flags.

Implemented as a manual bitflag over `u8`. Combine with `|`.

### impl KeyModifiers

```rust
impl KeyModifiers {
    pub const NONE: Type;
    pub const SHIFT: Type;
    pub const CONTROL: Type;
    pub const ALT: Type;
    pub fn contains(self, other: Self) -> bool;
    pub fn is_empty(self) -> bool;
}
```


### impl BitOr for KeyModifiers

```rust
impl BitOr for KeyModifiers {
}
```


### impl BitOrAssign for KeyModifiers

```rust
impl BitOrAssign for KeyModifiers {
}
```


### impl BitAnd for KeyModifiers

```rust
impl BitAnd for KeyModifiers {
}
```


### impl BitAndAssign for KeyModifiers

```rust
impl BitAndAssign for KeyModifiers {
}
```


### impl Not for KeyModifiers

```rust
impl Not for KeyModifiers {
}
```


### KeyCode

```rust
#[derive(Debug, Clone, Copy, PartialEq, Eq, Hash)]
pub enum KeyCode {
    Char(char),
    F(u8),
    Backspace,
    Enter,
    Left,
    Right,
    Up,
    Down,
    Home,
    End,
    PageUp,
    PageDown,
    Tab,
    BackTab,
    Delete,
    Insert,
    Escape,
}
```

Keyboard key codes.

### KeyEvent

```rust
#[derive(Debug, Clone, Copy, PartialEq, Eq, Hash)]
pub struct KeyEvent {
    pub code: KeyCode,
    pub modifiers: KeyModifiers,
}
```

Keyboard input event.

### MouseButton

```rust
#[derive(Debug, Clone, Copy, PartialEq, Eq, Hash)]
pub enum MouseButton {
    Left,
    Right,
    Middle,
}
```

Mouse button identifiers.

### MouseEventKind

```rust
#[derive(Debug, Clone, Copy, PartialEq, Eq, Hash)]
pub enum MouseEventKind {
    Down(MouseButton),
    Up(MouseButton),
    Moved,
    ScrollUp,
    ScrollDown,
}
```

Kinds of mouse events.

### MouseEvent

```rust
#[derive(Debug, Clone, Copy, PartialEq, Eq, Hash)]
pub struct MouseEvent {
    pub kind: MouseEventKind,
    pub position: Position,
    pub modifiers: KeyModifiers,
}
```

Mouse input event.

### Event

```rust
#[derive(Debug, Clone, Copy, PartialEq, Eq, Hash)]
pub enum Event {
    Key(KeyEvent),
    Mouse(MouseEvent),
    Resize(u16, u16),
    Close,
}
```

Terminal input event.


## src/grid.rs

### Size

```rust
#[derive(Debug, Clone, Copy, PartialEq, Eq, Hash, Default)]
pub struct Size {
    pub width: u16,
    pub height: u16,
}
```

Size of the grid.

### Position

```rust
#[derive(Debug, Clone, Copy, PartialEq, Eq, Hash, Default)]
pub struct Position {
    pub x: u16,
    pub y: u16,
}
```

Position in the grid.

### Rect

```rust
#[derive(Debug, Clone, Copy, PartialEq, Eq, Hash, Default)]
pub struct Rect {
    pub x: u16,
    pub y: u16,
    pub width: u16,
    pub height: u16,
}
```

Rectangle in the grid.

### Grid

```rust
pub struct Grid {
}
```

The main grid container for the terminal.

Note: This uses `alloc::vec::Vec`, requiring an allocator in `no_std` environments.
For strictly static, no-alloc environments, a static-sized grid type may be added in the future.

### impl Grid

```rust
impl Grid {
    pub fn new(width: usize, height: usize) -> Self;
    pub fn width(&self) -> usize;
    pub fn height(&self) -> usize;
    pub fn put(&mut self, x: usize, y: usize, cell: Cell);
    pub fn get(&self, x: usize, y: usize) -> &Cell;
    pub fn checked_put(&mut self, x: usize, y: usize, cell: Cell) -> Option<()>;
    pub fn checked_get(&self, x: usize, y: usize) -> Option<&Cell>;
    pub fn checked_get_mut(&mut self, x: usize, y: usize) -> Option<&mut Cell>;
    pub fn clear(&mut self);
    pub fn diff<'a>(&self, other: &'a Self) -> impl Trait;
}
```


### impl Iterator for DiffIterator

```rust
impl<'a, I1, I2> Iterator for DiffIterator {
}
```


### impl fmt::Display for Grid

```rust
impl fmt::Display for Grid {
}
```
